name: Bee Eye Moving Head Wash 1940B
comment:
Bee Eye LED Moving Head Wash Light 1940B: With 19x40W(RGBW / 4-IN-1) LEDs, variable motorized zoom (3.5 – 50 degrees), and individual 
pixel control, capable of creating a kaleidoscope effect. It not only has a beam zoom wash
 visual effect but also has built-in various macro function effects.

gwSpecs.description:

revision.text: Bee Eye LED Moving Head Wash from Beyond Lighting, Uploaded to GDTF Share.
